info.name: Ratepay Payment API 2.0 (Integration)
info.description:
## Ratepay Payment API 2.0 – Postman Collection (Integration)

This collection demonstrates the following Ratepay APIs:

- Payment API 2.0
    
- Hosted Payment Page
    
- Transaction Status API
    

All credentials, which are by default included, are integration credentials and publicly available. The collection stores variables, based on the responses of requests - to proceed sucessfully & an easy way in follow up requests.

Further integration details can be found at [docs.ratepay.com](https://docs.ratepay.com/).

item.name: 1 - 💳 Authorize transaction [Open Invoice - B2C - with OTP]

item.name: 2 - 🔍 Retrieve a list of session records

variable.description:
❗Mandatory, if Payment API 2.0 or Hosted Payment Page is used: partner_shop_id for Payment API 2.0. This value will be provided by your Ratepay representative.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/payment/openapi/payment_api/transaction-management/createtransaction#transaction-management/createtransaction/t=request&path=shop_baskets/partner_shop_id

➕ Optional, if Payment API 2.0 is used & applicable: X-Partner header for Payment API 2.0. This value will be provided by your Ratepay representative.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/payment/openapi/payment_api/transaction-management/createtransaction#transaction-management/createtransaction/t=request&in=header&path=x-partner

❗Mandatory, if Payment API 2.0, Hosted Payment Page, Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization. This value will be provided by your Ratepay representative.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=request&path=client_id

❗Mandatory, if Payment API 2.0, Hosted Payment Page, Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization. This value will be provided by your Ratepay representative.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=request&path=client_secret

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Request OAuth token" requests in the "Payment API 2.0" folder. 
Mandatory, if Payment API 2.0, Hosted Payment Page, One Time Passcode API, Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=response&c=200&path=access_token

❗Mandatory, if Hosted Payment Page is used: Part of OAuth authorization.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=request&path=audience

❗Mandatory, if Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=request&path=audience

❗Mandatory, if Payment API 2.0 is used: Part of OAuth authorization.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=request&path=audience

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Request OAuth token" requests in the "Hosted Payment Page" folder. 
Mandatory, if Hosted Payment Page is used: Part of OAuth authorization.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=response&c=200&path=access_token

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Request OAuth token" requests in the "Transaction Status API" folder. 
Mandatory, if Transaction Status API is used: Part of OAuth authorization.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/authentication/openapi/authentication_api/other/createoauthtoken#other/createoauthtoken/t=response&c=200&path=access_token

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Authorize transaction" requests in the "Payment API 2.0 > Transaction management" folder. 
Mandatory for follow up operations with Payment API 2.0.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/payment/openapi/payment_api/transaction-management/createtransaction#transaction-management/createtransaction/t=response&c=201&path=ratepay_transaction_id

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Incrementally authorize transaction" requests in the "Payment API 2.0 > Incremental authorize" folder. 
Mandatory for Get authorization requests with Payment API 2.0.
https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/payment/openapi/payment_api/incremental-authorization/incrementalauthorizationtransaction#incremental-authorization/incrementalauthorizationtransaction/t=response&c=201&path=ratepay_authorization_id

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Cancel transaction" requests in the "Payment API 2.0 > Cancellation" folder. 
Mandatory for Get cancellation requests with Payment API 2.0.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/payment/openapi/payment_api/cancellation/canceltransaction#cancellation/canceltransaction/t=response&c=201&path=&oneof=0/ratepay_cancellation_id

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Capture transaction" requests in the "Payment API 2.0 > Capture" folder. 
Mandatory for Get capture requests with Payment API 2.0.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/payment/openapi/payment_api/capture/capturetransaction#capture/capturetransaction/t=response&c=201&path=&oneof=0/ratepay_capture_id

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Refund transaction" requests in the "Payment API 2.0 > Refund" folder. 
Mandatory for Get refund requests with Payment API 2.0.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/payment/openapi/payment_api/capture/capturetransaction#capture/capturetransaction/t=response&c=201&path=&oneof=0/ratepay_capture_id

🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Create new session" requests in the "Hosted Payment Page" folder. 
Mandatory for Get requests with Hosted Payment Page.

https://docs.ratepay.com/apis/hpp/openapi/hpp_api/session-management-api/createsession#session-management-api/createsession/t=response&c=201&path=session_id
🔄 Temporary - Filled out automatically by "Retrieve" requests in the "Hosted Payment Page" folder.
